subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call and responded unto his Lord, the Most Compassionate, the Most Bountiful, on a Day wherein all have turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن سمع الندآء و اجاب ربه المشفق الکریم فی یوم فیه اعرض کل
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @proclamation to the people of the world, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
